title: Trip and Magic
description: A data pack that makes your trip and magic more enjoyable
body:
# **Please download both the data pack and the resource pack.**

![Trip and Magic Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/419163a09abec92cab51c1fea7b4359dce7d84c8_0.webp)

**[The Forum](https://forms.gle/RzBwWgviGPdgKdti9)**

# About this datapack

This data pack is centered around two categories: travel and magic.

It was created with the goal of making Minecraft more fun and ~~safer~~ **danger**.

Weapons and other items have been increased overall, and a variety of enemy mobs have been added, from original mobs to derivatives of existing enemy mobs.

Players can learn various recipes, weapons, and dishes on their travels, and the further they travel the stronger they become.


<details>
<summary>Corresponding language</summary>

English, Japanease

</details>


<details>
<summary>Additional elements(Trip)</summary>

Added New Weapons! New Stractures!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Additional elements(Magic)</summary>

Added New Spell Books! New Magic Staffs! New Magic Items!

</details>
